description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden table with a robust, industrial design. The tabletop is made from a single, thick slab of wood, featuring a natural grain pattern and some visible imperfections that add character. The table is supported by two sturdy, black metal legs, each forming an angular, X-shaped base that provides both stability and a modern aesthetic. The wood appears to be finished with a matte or semi-matte coating, giving it a slightly rustic yet refined look. The metal legs contrast sharply with the warm brown of the wood, emphasizing the table's contemporary style. This table would be suitable for communal use in urban parks, outdoor plazas, or modern indoor public spaces.
description: A large, rectangular wooden table with a thick, natural wood top and black X-shaped metal legs, combining rustic and industrial styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden tabletop and both angular black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the X-shaped profile of one metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the tabletop and both metal legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tabletop thickness and the X-shaped leg structure.
